description: Verify pages.json exists and is valid uni-app routing config with correct structure
steps: Step 1: Check that src/pages.json exists
Step 2: Verify it is valid JSON
Step 3: Verify 'pages' array registers all main pages (index, pet/list, pet/detail, pet/edit)
Step 4: Verify health pages are registered (vaccine, deworm, medical, medicine, weight, calendar)
Step 5: Verify knowledge pages (list, detail) and user pages (profile, vip, orders) are registered
Step 6: Verify tabBar section exists with exactly 4 tabs: 首页/档案/玩法/我的
Step 7: Verify each tabBar item has correct pagePath, text, and iconPath

description: Verify manifest.json is a valid uni-app manifest with Vue 3 and dual build target config
steps: Step 1: Check that src/manifest.json exists
Step 2: Verify it is valid JSON
Step 3: Verify 'vueVersion' is set to '3'
Step 4: Verify 'mp-weixin' section exists with appid field
Step 5: Verify 'h5' section exists for H5 build target

description: Verify NO vue-router is used anywhere in the codebase (uni-app uses pages.json)
steps: Step 1: Grep the entire src/ directory for 'vue-router' imports
Step 2: Grep for 'createRouter' function calls
Step 3: Verify zero matches found for both searches
Step 4: Confirm routing is solely managed by pages.json

description: Verify uView Plus is the UI library (not Vant or other web-only libraries)
steps: Step 1: Check package.json includes uview-plus dependency
Step 2: Grep src/ for 'vant' imports - should find zero
Step 3: Grep src/ for 'element-plus' imports - should find zero
Step 4: Verify uView Plus is registered in main.ts or pages.json easycom
Step 5: Check that components use u-* prefix (u-button, u-cell, etc.)

description: Verify rpx units are used throughout (not px) for mini-program compatibility
steps: Step 1: Sample 5-10 component .vue files
Step 2: Check their <style> sections for rpx units in layout/spacing
Step 3: Verify px is avoided for sizing (except borders/hairlines)
Step 4: Confirm styles use mini-program-compatible units

description: Verify chart library is uCharts/qiun-data-charts (not DOM-based echarts)
steps: Step 1: Check package.json for chart dependencies
Step 2: Grep src/ for 'echarts' imports - should find zero
Step 3: Verify weight chart component uses uCharts or qiun-data-charts
Step 4: Confirm chart renders on <canvas> element, not DOM

description: Verify platform adapter layer exists with correct structure for H5/mp-weixin abstraction
steps: Step 1: Check src/platform/ directory exists
Step 2: Verify data.ts, auth.ts, subscribeMessage.ts, pay.ts, storage.ts files exist
Step 3: Check each file exports unified interface with H5 and mp-weixin implementations
Step 4: Verify conditional compilation (#ifdef MP-WEIXIN / #ifdef H5) or runtime flags are used
Step 5: Grep components/stores to ensure they use platform adapter, never direct wx.* calls

description: Verify NO direct wx.* or wx.cloud.* calls outside platform adapter layer
steps: Step 1: Grep src/components/ for 'wx\.' - should find zero
Step 2: Grep src/stores/ for 'wx\.' - should find zero
Step 3: Grep src/pages/ for 'wx\.' - should find zero
Step 4: Verify all WeChat API calls are isolated in src/platform/
Step 5: Confirm components use platform adapter for cloud functions, storage, etc.

description: Verify NO direct localStorage/IndexedDB calls outside platform adapter
steps: Step 1: Grep src/components/ for 'localStorage' - should find zero
Step 2: Grep src/stores/ for 'localStorage' - should find zero
Step 3: Grep src/pages/ for 'localStorage' - should find zero
Step 4: Verify storage operations use uni.setStorageSync wrappers in platform/storage.ts

description: Verify H5 build starts successfully and serves on localhost:5173
steps: Step 1: Run 'npm install' to install dependencies
Step 2: Run 'npm run dev:h5' to start H5 dev server
Step 3: Verify server starts without errors
Step 4: Verify app is accessible at http://localhost:5173
Step 5: Take screenshot of running H5 app as evidence
Step 6: Verify no console errors in browser

description: Verify mp-weixin build compiles successfully without errors
steps: Step 1: Run 'npm run build:mp-weixin' command
Step 2: Verify build completes without errors
Step 3: Check dist/build/mp-weixin directory is created
Step 4: Verify essential files exist (app.json, app.js, pages)
Step 5: Capture build output log as evidence
Step 6: Confirm no TypeScript errors, no compilation warnings

description: Verify 4-tab bottom navigation bar renders correctly with all tabs
steps: Step 1: Open H5 app at http://localhost:5173
Step 2: Verify bottom tab bar is visible
Step 3: Verify 4 tabs are present: 首页, 档案, 玩法, 我的
Step 4: Verify tabs have correct icons and labels
Step 5: Tap each tab and verify navigation works
Step 6: Take screenshot showing all 4 tabs
Step 7: Verify active tab is highlighted

description: Verify home page (首页) renders with health calendar, pet cards, and today's todos
steps: Step 1: Navigate to 首页 tab
Step 2: Verify page title shows '毛叽' or '健康日历'
Step 3: Verify pet card section is visible (or empty state if no pets)
Step 4: Verify health calendar widget is displayed
Step 5: Verify 今日待办 (today's todos) section is visible
Step 6: Take screenshot of complete home page
Step 7: Verify layout is clean and responsive

description: Verify pet switcher appears on home page when user has multiple pets
steps: Step 1: Create first pet via pet archive
Step 2: Create second pet via pet archive
Step 3: Return to home page
Step 4: Verify horizontal pet switcher appears at top
Step 5: Verify both pet avatars are shown
Step 6: Tap second pet avatar and verify switch
Step 7: Take screenshot showing pet switcher with multiple pets

description: Verify 玩法 tab shows only a 'Coming Soon' placeholder (AI features deferred to V2)
steps: Step 1: Navigate to 玩法 tab
Step 2: Verify page shows '敬请期待' or 'Coming Soon' message
Step 3: Verify friendly illustration or image is displayed
Step 4: Verify copy mentions AI 写真 is coming soon
Step 5: Verify NO gallery, upload, generation, payment UI is present
Step 6: Verify NO AI-related interactive features exist
Step 7: Take screenshot of placeholder page

description: Create a new pet with all required fields via pet archive form
steps: Step 1: Navigate to 档案 (pet list) tab
Step 2: Tap '添加宠物' or '+' button to open create form
Step 3: Upload pet avatar image
Step 4: Enter pet name '毛球'
Step 5: Select species (cat/dog/other)
Step 6: Enter breed
Step 7: Select gender
Step 8: Enter birthday date
Step 9: Enter current weight
Step 10: Select neutered status (yes/no/unknown)
Step 11: Optionally enter chip number
Step 12: Tap submit button
Step 13: Verify success message and return to pet list
Step 14: Take screenshot showing new pet in list

description: View pet detail page showing all pet information
steps: Step 1: From pet list, tap on a pet card
Step 2: Verify pet detail page opens
Step 3: Verify avatar is displayed prominently
Step 4: Verify all fields are shown: name, species, breed, gender, birthday, age
Step 5: Verify weight, neutered status, chip number are displayed
Step 6: Take screenshot of pet detail page

description: Edit existing pet information and verify changes persist
steps: Step 1: Open pet detail page
Step 2: Tap '编辑' or edit button
Step 3: Change pet name from '毛球' to '毛毛'
Step 4: Update weight value
Step 5: Tap save button
Step 6: Verify success message
Step 7: Return to detail page and verify changes are shown
Step 8: Take screenshot confirming updated information

description: Delete a pet with confirmation modal and verify soft delete
steps: Step 1: Open pet detail page
Step 2: Tap delete button
Step 3: Verify confirmation modal appears
Step 4: Verify modal warns about deletion
Step 5: Tap confirm in modal
Step 6: Verify pet is removed from list
Step 7: Verify pet is soft-deleted (deletedAt set, records retained)
Step 8: Take screenshot of empty list or remaining pets

description: Verify multiple pets can be managed (create 3+ pets and verify list)
steps: Step 1: Create first pet '毛球' (cat)
Step 2: Create second pet '旺财' (dog)
Step 3: Create third pet '咪咪' (cat)
Step 4: Return to pet list
Step 5: Verify all 3 pets are shown as cards
Step 6: Verify each card shows avatar, name, basic info
Step 7: Take screenshot of pet list with multiple pets

description: Verify pet avatar upload works via platform storage adapter
steps: Step 1: Open pet create/edit form
Step 2: Tap avatar upload area
Step 3: Select image file
Step 4: Verify image preview appears
Step 5: Save pet
Step 6: Verify avatar displays correctly in list and detail pages
Step 7: In H5 build, verify image is stored via IndexedDB/object URL mock
Step 8: Take screenshot showing uploaded avatar

description: Create a vaccination record with preset vaccine (狂犬/三联/四联)
steps: Step 1: Navigate to health section, select pet
Step 2: Tap '疫苗管理' to open vaccine list
Step 3: Tap '添加疫苗' button
Step 4: Select preset vaccine type (e.g., 狂犬疫苗)
Step 5: Enter vaccination date
Step 6: Enter hospital/clinic name
Step 7: Add optional note
Step 8: Tap save
Step 9: Verify nextDate is auto-computed (365 days for rabies)
Step 10: Verify record appears in vaccine list
Step 11: Take screenshot of vaccine list with new record

description: Create custom vaccine record and verify next date calculation
steps: Step 1: Open vaccine list
Step 2: Tap add vaccine
Step 3: Select 'custom' vaccine type
Step 4: Enter custom vaccine name
Step 5: Enter date and hospital
Step 6: Save record
Step 7: Verify custom vaccine appears in list
Step 8: Take screenshot

description: Verify vaccine list shows upcoming vaccines sorted by nextDate
steps: Step 1: Create 3+ vaccine records with different dates
Step 2: Open vaccine list
Step 3: Verify vaccines are sorted by nextDate (soonest first)
Step 4: Verify each item shows vaccine name, date, nextDate
Step 5: Verify overdue vaccines are highlighted in red/warning color
Step 6: Take screenshot of sorted vaccine list

description: Complete a vaccine record and verify nextDate updates for next cycle
steps: Step 1: Open vaccine detail page for upcoming vaccine
Step 2: Tap '完成' (complete) button
Step 3: Verify completion date is recorded
Step 4: Verify nextDate is updated to next cycle (e.g., +365 days)
Step 5: Verify record shows as completed in list
Step 6: Take screenshot showing updated record

description: Postpone a vaccine and verify nextDate is pushed forward
steps: Step 1: Open vaccine detail page
Step 2: Tap '推迟' (postpone) button
Step 3: Select new date for vaccination
Step 4: Confirm postponement
Step 5: Verify nextDate is updated to selected date
Step 6: Take screenshot confirming postponement

description: Verify first-year combo vaccine sequence (3-shot 21-day intervals)
steps: Step 1: Create puppy/kitten with age < 1 year
Step 2: Add first 三联/四联 vaccine
Step 3: Verify nextDate is computed as +21 days for second shot
Step 4: Complete first shot
Step 5: Verify nextDate updates to +21 days for third shot
Step 6: Complete second shot
Step 7: Verify nextDate updates to +21 days for third shot
Step 8: Complete third shot
Step 9: Verify nextDate updates to +365 days for annual booster
Step 10: Take screenshot showing sequence

description: Create internal deworming record (体内) with 90-day cycle
steps: Step 1: Navigate to health section, select pet
Step 2: Tap '驱虫管理'
Step 3: Tap add deworming record
Step 4: Select '体内' (internal) type
Step 5: Enter date and medicine name
Step 6: Save record
Step 7: Verify nextDate is set to +90 days
Step 8: Verify record appears in deworm list
Step 9: Take screenshot

description: Create external deworming record (体外) with 30-day cycle
steps: Step 1: Open deworm list
Step 2: Add new deworming record
Step 3: Select '体外' (external) type
Step 4: Enter date and product name
Step 5: Save record
Step 6: Verify nextDate is set to +30 days
Step 7: Verify record appears in list
Step 8: Take screenshot

description: Complete deworming record and verify cycle continuation
steps: Step 1: Open deworm detail for upcoming deworming
Step 2: Tap '完成' button
Step 3: Verify completion is recorded
Step 4: Verify nextDate advances by cycle (30d for 体外, 90d for 体内)
Step 5: Take screenshot showing updated record

description: Postpone deworming and verify nextDate updates
steps: Step 1: Open deworm detail
Step 2: Tap '推迟' button
Step 3: Select postpone date
Step 4: Confirm
Step 5: Verify nextDate is updated
Step 6: Take screenshot

description: Create medical/physical exam record with report upload
steps: Step 1: Navigate to health section
Step 2: Tap '体检记录'
Step 3: Tap add medical record
Step 4: Enter exam date
Step 5: Enter hospital/clinic name
Step 6: Upload report image or PDF via platform storage
Step 7: Enter conclusion/summary
Step 8: Add key metrics (optional)
Step 9: Save record
Step 10: Verify nextDate is set to +365 days (annual)
Step 11: Verify record appears in medical list
Step 12: Take screenshot

description: Verify medical exam nextDate adjusts for senior pets (180-day cycle if age >= 7 years)
steps: Step 1: Create pet with age >= 7 years (senior pet)
Step 2: Add medical exam record
Step 3: Save record
Step 4: Verify nextDate is computed as +180 days (not 365)
Step 5: Take screenshot showing 180-day cycle for senior pet

description: View medical record detail and preview uploaded report attachment
steps: Step 1: Open medical record list
Step 2: Tap on record with uploaded report
Step 3: Verify detail page shows all information
Step 4: Tap on report attachment
Step 5: Verify image/PDF preview opens
Step 6: In H5 build, verify attachment loads from IndexedDB object URL
Step 7: Take screenshot of preview

description: Create ongoing medication record with daily reminder
steps: Step 1: Navigate to health section
Step 2: Tap '用药记录'
Step 3: Tap add medicine record
Step 4: Enter medicine name
Step 5: Enter dosage information
Step 6: Set start date and end date
Step 7: Enable daily reminder
Step 8: Save record
Step 9: Verify record appears in current medications list
Step 10: Take screenshot

description: Verify current medications list shows only active (ongoing) medications
steps: Step 1: Create medicine record with end date in future (active)
Step 2: Create medicine record with end date in past (expired)
Step 3: Open medicine list
Step 4: Verify only active medication is shown in 'current' section
Step 5: Verify expired medication is in history or hidden
Step 6: Take screenshot

description: Add manual weight entry to weight timeline
steps: Step 1: Navigate to health section
Step 2: Tap '成长记录' or '体重'
Step 3: Tap add weight entry
Step 4: Enter weight value (kg)
Step 5: Select date
Step 6: Add optional note
Step 7: Save entry
Step 8: Verify entry appears in timeline list (newest first)
Step 9: Take screenshot of weight timeline

description: Verify weight timeline shows entries sorted newest-first with notes
steps: Step 1: Create 5+ weight entries with different dates
Step 2: Add notes to 2-3 entries
Step 3: Open weight timeline
Step 4: Verify entries are sorted newest-first
Step 5: Verify each entry shows weight, date, and note (if present)
Step 6: Take screenshot

description: View weight chart visualization (line chart over time)
steps: Step 1: Create 10+ weight entries spanning several months
Step 2: Open weight section
Step 3: Verify line chart is displayed showing weight over time
Step 4: Verify chart uses uCharts or qiun-data-charts (canvas-based)
Step 5: Verify X-axis shows dates, Y-axis shows weight
Step 6: Verify chart is interactive (can tap points to see details)
Step 7: Take screenshot of weight chart

description: Verify weight chart shows healthy band overlay based on breed standards
steps: Step 1: Create pet with specific breed that has known weight range
Step 2: Add weight entries
Step 3: Open weight chart
Step 4: Verify chart shows healthy weight band/range overlay
Step 5: Verify band is based on breed standards from breed wiki
Step 6: Verify pet's weight line shows relative to healthy range
Step 7: Take screenshot showing band overlay

description: View unified health calendar showing all upcoming health tasks across all pets
steps: Step 1: Create 2+ pets
Step 2: Add vaccine, deworm, and medical records for each pet
Step 3: Navigate to health calendar (健康日历)
Step 4: Verify calendar grid shows current month
Step 5: Verify days with health tasks show category dots/indicators
Step 6: Verify tasks from all pets are aggregated
Step 7: Take screenshot of calendar with multiple task indicators

description: View 今日待办 (today's todos) card with urgent health tasks
steps: Step 1: Create health records with nextDate = today
Step 2: Navigate to home page or health calendar
Step 3: Verify '今日待办' card is displayed prominently
Step 4: Verify card shows red/urgent styling
Step 5: Verify today's tasks are listed in the card
Step 6: Take screenshot

description: View overdue health tasks (逾期) list with warning indicators
steps: Step 1: Create health records with nextDate in the past
Step 2: Open health calendar
Step 3: Verify '逾期' (overdue) section is displayed
Step 4: Verify overdue tasks are shown with warning color/icon
Step 5: Verify list shows task type, pet name, how many days overdue
Step 6: Take screenshot

description: Tap calendar day to open bottom sheet with that day's health tasks
steps: Step 1: Create health tasks for specific future date
Step 2: Open health calendar
Step 3: Tap on calendar day that has task indicators
Step 4: Verify bottom sheet slides up
Step 5: Verify sheet shows all tasks for that day
Step 6: Verify each task shows type, pet name, task name
Step 7: Take screenshot of bottom sheet

description: Complete health task directly from calendar bottom sheet (一键完成)
steps: Step 1: Open calendar and tap day with upcoming task
Step 2: In bottom sheet, verify '完成' button is shown for each task
Step 3: Tap '完成' button for a task
Step 4: Verify confirmation or success message
Step 5: Verify task is marked complete
Step 6: Verify nextDate is updated for next cycle
Step 7: Take screenshot showing completed task

description: Postpone health task from calendar bottom sheet (一键推迟)
steps: Step 1: Open calendar bottom sheet for day with task
Step 2: Tap '推迟' button for a task
Step 3: Select new postpone date
Step 4: Confirm postponement
Step 5: Verify task nextDate is updated
Step 6: Verify calendar updates to show task on new date
Step 7: Take screenshot

description: View knowledge library list with categories (疫苗/驱虫/常见病/营养/急救)
steps: Step 1: Navigate to knowledge section
Step 2: Verify knowledge article list is displayed
Step 3: Verify categories are shown: 疫苗, 驱虫, 常见病, 营养, 急救
Step 4: Verify at least 20 articles are seeded
Step 5: Verify each article shows title, cover image, category
Step 6: Take screenshot of knowledge list

description: Filter knowledge articles by category
steps: Step 1: Open knowledge list
Step 2: Verify category filter tabs/buttons are present
Step 3: Tap '疫苗' category
Step 4: Verify only vaccine-related articles are shown
Step 5: Tap '营养' category
Step 6: Verify only nutrition articles are shown
Step 7: Take screenshot of filtered list

description: Search knowledge articles by keyword
steps: Step 1: Open knowledge list
Step 2: Verify search bar is present
Step 3: Enter search keyword (e.g., '狂犬')
Step 4: Verify search results show matching articles
Step 5: Verify results highlight keyword match in title
Step 6: Take screenshot of search results

description: View knowledge article detail with markdown-rendered content
steps: Step 1: From knowledge list, tap on an article
Step 2: Verify article detail page opens
Step 3: Verify title, cover image, category are shown
Step 4: Verify article content is rendered (markdown -> rich text)
Step 5: Verify formatting (headings, lists, bold) is preserved
Step 6: Verify images in content are displayed
Step 7: Take screenshot of article detail

description: Verify breed encyclopedia (品种百科) has cat and dog breeds with health info
steps: Step 1: Navigate to knowledge section or breed wiki
Step 2: Verify breed list is accessible
Step 3: Verify at least 20 cat breeds are listed
Step 4: Verify at least 20 dog breeds are listed
Step 5: Select a breed (e.g., 金毛)
Step 6: Verify breed detail shows health traits, common diseases, care tips, weight ranges
Step 7: Take screenshot of breed detail

description: Verify breed data is used in pet breed picker during pet creation
steps: Step 1: Open pet create form
Step 2: Tap breed selection field
Step 3: Verify breed picker shows list from breed encyclopedia
Step 4: Verify breeds are categorized by species (cat/dog)
Step 5: Select a breed
Step 6: Verify breed is saved with pet
Step 7: Take screenshot of breed picker

description: Perform login via platform auth adapter (H5: demo login, mp-weixin: uni.login)
steps: Step 1: Open app (not logged in)
Step 2: In H5 build, verify 'Demo 一键登录' button is shown
Step 3: Tap login button
Step 4: Verify login succeeds with deterministic demo openid
Step 5: Verify user is redirected to home or user profile
Step 6: Verify login state persists across page refresh
Step 7: Take screenshot showing logged-in state

description: View user profile center (我的中心) with avatar, nickname, and sections
steps: Step 1: Navigate to '我的' tab
Step 2: Verify user profile page is displayed
Step 3: Verify avatar and nickname are shown at top
Step 4: Verify pet list summary is present
Step 5: Verify VIP status section is shown
Step 6: Verify orders entry is present
Step 7: Verify settings and about sections are accessible
Step 8: Take screenshot of user profile

description: Verify privacy consent modal appears on first app launch and blocks usage
steps: Step 1: Clear app storage to simulate first launch
Step 2: Open app
Step 3: Verify privacy consent modal appears immediately
Step 4: Verify modal blocks all app interaction (blocking modal)
Step 5: Verify '用户协议' and '隐私政策' links are present
Step 6: Verify modal has 'reject' and 'accept' buttons
Step 7: Take screenshot of privacy modal

description: Accept privacy consent and verify app becomes accessible
steps: Step 1: First launch privacy modal is displayed
Step 2: Tap 'accept' or '同意' button
Step 3: Verify modal closes
Step 4: Verify app is now accessible
Step 5: Verify consent version is tracked in storage
Step 6: Verify on next launch, modal does not reappear
Step 7: Take screenshot of accessible app

description: View 用户协议 and 隐私政策 documents
steps: Step 1: Navigate to settings or user profile
Step 2: Find '用户协议' link and tap it
Step 3: Verify user agreement document is displayed
Step 4: Return and tap '隐私政策' link
Step 5: Verify privacy policy document is displayed
Step 6: Take screenshot of policy pages

description: View VIP membership page showing benefits and pricing
steps: Step 1: Navigate to VIP section from user profile
Step 2: Verify VIP membership page is displayed
Step 3: Verify benefits are listed: 高级提醒, 体检解读, 更多档案位
Step 4: Verify pricing is shown (月度 19.9)
Step 5: Verify purchase button is present
Step 6: Verify current VIP status is displayed (active/expired)
Step 7: Take screenshot of VIP page

description: Purchase VIP membership via platform pay adapter (H5: mock payment flow)
steps: Step 1: Open VIP membership page
Step 2: Tap purchase button
Step 3: Verify payment confirmation dialog appears
Step 4: In H5 build, verify mock payment flow is triggered
Step 5: Confirm mock payment
Step 6: Verify success message is shown
Step 7: Verify VIP status is updated to active
Step 8: Verify vipExpireAt is set (e.g., +30 days)
Step 9: Take screenshot showing VIP active status

description: Verify VIP-gated features are accessible to VIP users
steps: Step 1: Ensure user has active VIP status
Step 2: Attempt to access VIP-only features (e.g., advanced reminders)
Step 3: Verify features are accessible
Step 4: Log out and log in as non-VIP user
Step 5: Attempt to access same features
Step 6: Verify features show VIP upgrade prompt
Step 7: Take screenshot showing gated feature

description: View order history showing VIP purchases
steps: Step 1: Purchase VIP membership to create order
Step 2: Navigate to orders page from user profile
Step 3: Verify orders list is displayed
Step 4: Verify VIP purchase order is shown
Step 5: Verify order shows type, amount, status, payment time
Step 6: Take screenshot of orders list

description: Trigger subscribe message authorization flow (H5: mock, mp-weixin: real)
steps: Step 1: Navigate to settings or health reminder setup
Step 2: Tap '订阅消息授权' or health reminder enable
Step 3: In H5 build, verify mock authorization dialog appears
Step 4: Verify dialog lists health reminder templates (疫苗/驱虫/体检/用药)
Step 5: Accept authorization
Step 6: Verify success toast is shown
Step 7: Verify consent is recorded in platform adapter
Step 8: Take screenshot of authorization flow

description: Verify idempotent re-prompt logic for subscribe message (don't spam user)
steps: Step 1: Authorize subscribe messages
Step 2: Navigate away and return to reminder settings
Step 3: Verify authorization prompt does NOT reappear immediately
Step 4: Verify status shows 'already authorized'
Step 5: Verify option to re-authorize is available if needed
Step 6: Take screenshot

description: View customer service page with QR code and FAQ
steps: Step 1: Navigate to settings or help section
Step 2: Tap '客服' or customer service
Step 3: Verify customer service page opens
Step 4: Verify 企业微信 QR code is displayed
Step 5: Verify FAQ section is present with at least 30 entries
Step 6: Tap an FAQ item and verify answer expands
Step 7: Take screenshot of customer service page

description: Verify healthCycle.ts computeNextDate function for vaccine cycles
steps: Step 1: Locate src/utils/healthCycle.ts file
Step 2: Verify computeNextDate function exists
Step 3: Run unit test for 狂犬疫苗 -> verify 365-day cycle
Step 4: Run unit test for 三联/四联 first-year -> verify 21-day intervals for 3 shots
Step 5: Run unit test for 三联/四联 after first year -> verify 365-day cycle
Step 6: Capture unit test output as evidence
Step 7: Verify all tests pass

description: Verify healthCycle.ts computeNextDate for deworm cycles (30d/90d)
steps: Step 1: Run unit test for 体外驱虫 -> verify 30-day cycle
Step 2: Run unit test for 体内驱虫 -> verify 90-day cycle
Step 3: Verify edge cases (leap years, month boundaries)
Step 4: Capture test output
Step 5: Verify all tests pass

description: Verify healthCycle.ts computeNextDate for medical exam (365d, 180d for seniors)
steps: Step 1: Run unit test for annual exam (pet age < 7) -> verify 365-day cycle
Step 2: Run unit test for senior pet exam (age >= 7) -> verify 180-day cycle
Step 3: Verify age boundary condition (exactly 7 years)
Step 4: Capture test output
Step 5: Verify all tests pass

description: Verify health reminder pipeline simulates 7/3/1-day window for upcoming tasks
steps: Step 1: Create health record with nextDate = 7 days from now
Step 2: Open health calendar
Step 3: Verify task appears in 'upcoming' section with '7天后' indicator
Step 4: Create record with nextDate = 3 days from now
Step 5: Verify task shows '3天后' with higher urgency styling
Step 6: Create record with nextDate = 1 day from now
Step 7: Verify task shows '明天' with urgent styling
Step 8: Take screenshot showing tiered reminder urgency

description: Verify H5 mock data adapter seeds non-empty demo data for verification
steps: Step 1: Clear all app storage
Step 2: Open H5 app fresh
Step 3: Verify demo pet is pre-seeded (or easy onboarding flow creates one)
Step 4: Verify some health records are seeded for demo
Step 5: Verify health calendar shows seeded tasks
Step 6: Verify screens are not empty on first load
Step 7: Take screenshot showing seeded data

description: Verify empty state UI when no pets exist
steps: Step 1: Clear all pets from storage
Step 2: Navigate to pet list (档案 tab)
Step 3: Verify empty state component is displayed
Step 4: Verify friendly illustration/icon is shown
Step 5: Verify message like '还没有宠物，快去添加吧'
Step 6: Verify '添加宠物' button is prominent
Step 7: Take screenshot of empty state

description: Verify empty state when no weight records exist
steps: Step 1: Create pet but add no weight records
Step 2: Navigate to weight timeline
Step 3: Verify empty state is shown
Step 4: Verify message indicates no weight records
Step 5: Verify '添加体重' call-to-action is present
Step 6: Take screenshot

description: Verify empty state when no knowledge search results
steps: Step 1: Open knowledge library
Step 2: Search for nonsense keyword that returns no results
Step 3: Verify empty search results state is shown
Step 4: Verify message like '未找到相关知识'
Step 5: Take screenshot

description: Verify app layout is responsive and mobile-optimized
steps: Step 1: Open H5 app in browser
Step 2: Verify viewport is set to mobile width
Step 3: Check multiple pages (home, pet list, health calendar)
Step 4: Verify content fits within mobile screen (no horizontal scroll)
Step 5: Verify touch targets are >= 44px (~88rpx)
Step 6: Take screenshots at different pages showing responsive layout

description: Verify brand color #FF8A65 (warm coral) is used for primary actions and accents
steps: Step 1: Inspect primary buttons in app
Step 2: Verify brand color #FF8A65 is used
Step 3: Check tab bar active state color
Step 4: Check accent colors on cards and CTAs
Step 5: Take screenshot showing brand color usage

description: Verify UI uses rounded cards with soft shadows and generous spacing
steps: Step 1: View home page with pet cards
Step 2: Verify cards have rounded corners (border-radius)
Step 3: Verify subtle box-shadow is applied
Step 4: Verify spacing between cards is generous (not cramped)
Step 5: Take screenshot showing card design

description: Verify Chinese microcopy is friendly and clear throughout app
steps: Step 1: Review button labels, headings, placeholders across app
Step 2: Verify text is in Chinese (Simplified)
Step 3: Verify tone is friendly and conversational (符合宠物主人语境)
Step 4: Check error messages are helpful, not technical
Step 5: Verify empty states have encouraging copy
Step 6: Take screenshots of various text elements

description: Verify src/platform/data.ts exports unified CRUD interface for pet/health/knowledge
steps: Step 1: Read src/platform/data.ts file
Step 2: Verify it exports functions for pet CRUD (create, read, update, delete)
Step 3: Verify it exports functions for health record CRUD
Step 4: Verify it exports functions for knowledge fetch
Step 5: Verify conditional compilation for H5 vs mp-weixin implementations
Step 6: In H5 mode, verify mock uses uni.setStorageSync wrapper
Step 7: Take code snapshot as evidence

description: Verify src/platform/auth.ts handles login for both H5 and mp-weixin
steps: Step 1: Read src/platform/auth.ts file
Step 2: Verify it exports login function
Step 3: Verify H5 implementation returns deterministic demo openid
Step 4: Verify mp-weixin implementation calls uni.login
Step 5: Take code snapshot

description: Verify src/platform/subscribeMessage.ts handles authorization for both targets
steps: Step 1: Read src/platform/subscribeMessage.ts file
Step 2: Verify it exports requestSubscribeMessage function
Step 3: Verify H5 implementation shows mock dialog and records consent
Step 4: Verify mp-weixin implementation calls uni.requestSubscribeMessage
Step 5: Take code snapshot

description: Verify src/platform/pay.ts handles VIP payment for both targets
steps: Step 1: Read src/platform/pay.ts file
Step 2: Verify it exports payment function
Step 3: Verify H5 implementation mocks success/fail payment flow
Step 4: Verify mp-weixin implementation calls uni.requestPayment
Step 5: Take code snapshot

description: Verify src/platform/storage.ts handles image/file upload for both targets
steps: Step 1: Read src/platform/storage.ts file
Step 2: Verify it exports upload and download functions
Step 3: Verify H5 implementation uses IndexedDB for blob storage
Step 4: Verify H5 returns object URLs for preview
Step 5: Verify mp-weixin implementation calls wx.cloud.uploadFile
Step 6: Take code snapshot

description: Verify cloud function source code structure exists (not required to execute in H5)
steps: Step 1: Check cloudfunctions/ directory exists
Step 2: Verify subdirectories: pet-crud, health-crud, health-cron, pay-order, pay-notify, user-init
Step 3: Verify each has index.js or index.ts entry point
Step 4: Verify functions are documented (comments explain purpose)
Step 5: Note: execution not required for H5 verification, but code must be present
Step 6: Take directory tree snapshot

description: Verify Pinia stores exist for user, pet, and health state
steps: Step 1: Check src/stores/ directory
Step 2: Verify user.ts store exists and exports useUserStore
Step 3: Verify pet.ts store exists and exports usePetStore
Step 4: Verify health.ts store exists and exports useHealthStore
Step 5: Verify stores use Pinia defineStore
Step 6: Verify persistence via uni.setStorageSync wrapper (not raw localStorage)
Step 7: Take code snapshot

description: Complete end-to-end flow: first-time user onboards pet and sets up first vaccine
steps: Step 1: Clear storage, simulate first launch
Step 2: Accept privacy consent modal
Step 3: Log in via demo login (H5)
Step 4: Navigate to pet archive and create first pet
Step 5: Navigate to health section for that pet
Step 6: Add first vaccine record (狂犬疫苗)
Step 7: Verify vaccine appears in list with nextDate
Step 8: Navigate to health calendar
Step 9: Verify vaccine task appears on calendar
Step 10: Authorize subscribe messages for reminders
Step 11: Return to home page
Step 12: Verify pet card and upcoming task are displayed
Step 13: Take screenshot of complete home page showing user's first pet and health task

description: Multi-pet health management: user with 3 pets views unified calendar with all tasks
steps: Step 1: Create 3 pets (2 cats, 1 dog)
Step 2: Add vaccine record for pet 1
Step 3: Add deworm record for pet 2
Step 4: Add medical record for pet 3
Step 5: Navigate to health calendar
Step 6: Verify calendar shows tasks from all 3 pets
Step 7: Verify tasks are color-coded or labeled by pet
Step 8: Tap a day with multiple tasks
Step 9: Verify bottom sheet shows tasks from different pets
Step 10: Complete one task from the sheet
Step 11: Verify task updates across all views
Step 12: Take screenshot of unified calendar with multi-pet tasks

description: VIP user journey: purchase VIP and access gated features
steps: Step 1: Start as free user
Step 2: Navigate to VIP page from user profile
Step 3: Review VIP benefits
Step 4: Purchase VIP via mock payment (H5)
Step 5: Verify VIP badge appears on profile
Step 6: Verify vipExpireAt is set
Step 7: Attempt to add more than free-tier pet limit
Step 8: Verify VIP user can add unlimited pets
Step 9: Navigate to order history
Step 10: Verify VIP purchase order is recorded
Step 11: Take screenshot showing VIP status and benefits

description: Health reminder workflow: set up reminder, view in calendar, complete task
steps: Step 1: Create pet and add vaccine record with nextDate in 7 days
Step 2: Authorize subscribe messages
Step 3: Navigate to health calendar
Step 4: Verify task appears with '7天后' indicator
Step 5: Fast-forward mock date to nextDate (or create task for today)
Step 6: Verify task moves to '今日待办' card
Step 7: Open task from calendar
Step 8: Complete task via '一键完成'
Step 9: Verify nextDate updates to next cycle
Step 10: Verify task disappears from today's list
Step 11: Verify new nextDate appears on calendar
Step 12: Take screenshots of before/after completion

description: Upload daily photos to pet album and verify grid view
steps: Step 1: Navigate to pet detail page
Step 2: Open '相册' (album) section
Step 3: Tap upload photo button
Step 4: Select image file
Step 5: Verify photo is uploaded via platform.storage
Step 6: Verify photo appears in album grid
Step 7: Upload 5+ more photos
Step 8: Verify grid view displays all photos
Step 9: Verify photos are organized by date
Step 10: Take screenshot of album grid

description: Preview album photo and delete photo
steps: Step 1: Open pet album with photos
Step 2: Tap on a photo thumbnail
Step 3: Verify photo preview opens (full screen or modal)
Step 4: Verify delete button is present in preview
Step 5: Tap delete button
Step 6: Verify confirmation dialog appears
Step 7: Confirm deletion
Step 8: Verify photo is removed from grid
Step 9: Take screenshot
